overall.description: A smooth drone camera flight through an empty Alpine village in Microsoft Flight Simulator. The camera glides along a paved road past traditional wooden chalets and mixed-era buildings, with dramatic snow-capped mountains and forested cliffs framing the background. The scene features clear summer weather with no pedestrians or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance with large stone building

agents.ego_description: flying forward through the village street at low altitude, approaching the large stone building on the right

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with multiple windows and weathered facade
dramatic mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible in the valley background
steep mountain slope covered in dense green forest rising behind the village
small traditional wooden structure with sloped roof

segments.scene_description: The drone camera moves forward through the village entrance, with a large stone building dominating the right side of the frame. Snow-capped mountains are visible in the distant valley center, while a forested cliff rises on the right. The street is empty and paved, with a small wooden house visible on the left in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional wooden chalet district with mixed architecture

events.description: passing the large stone building, entering district with traditional wooden chalet architecture

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the village, drifting slightly left while passing traditional wooden buildings

entered.detail: traditional Alpine wooden chalets with dark timber construction and sloped roofs
modern multi-story yellow apartment block with flat roof and multiple windows
light-colored building with wooden balcony visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stone building, the camera moves through a district of traditional wooden chalets on the right. The yellow apartment building becomes visible ahead on the left, growing larger as the camera approaches. The street remains empty, with the snow-capped mountains still dominating the background view.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the yellow apartment building at street end

events.description: slowing approach as camera nears the yellow building and the street narrows

agents.ego_description: flying forward and slightly descending toward the yellow building, preparing to pass it on the left

entered.detail: deep valley between the snow-capped peaks becoming visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes the yellow apartment building on the left as the street narrows. The wooden chalets recede behind as the view opens toward the mountain valley ahead. The snow-capped peaks dominate the horizon, with the camera moving steadily toward the end of the village street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone flight through an empty Alpine village that gradually opens from a narrow street into a wide mountain valley. It begins at the village entrance, gliding past a large stone building on the right and a distant wooden house on the left, with a forested cliff and snow-capped peaks framing the horizon. As the camera moves forward, the stone structure recedes to make way for a row of traditional wooden chalets on the right and a yellow apartment building that grows larger on the left. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the yellow building and the street narrows, causing the chalets to fall behind. Finally, the view expands toward the end of the village street, where the towering snow-capped peaks dominate the horizon as the camera moves steadily into the open valley.
